$comment: AVS response codes. Source: Kicbac-Direct-Post-API.pdf AVS appendix / docs.nmi.com response codes reference.

codes.2: Exact match, 5-character numeric ZIP, customer name
codes.6: Exact match, 5-character numeric ZIP, customer name
codes.3: Address and customer name match only
codes.7: Address and customer name match only
codes.1: 5-character ZIP and customer name match only
codes.5: 5-character ZIP and customer name match only
codes.4: No address or ZIP match, customer name
codes.8: No address or ZIP match, customer name
